pages.text: Pain remembers. The Chain merely keeps count.

Damage taken is stored as $(l)Penance$(). The next direct melee hit spends that stored Penance for bonus damage, up to a configured cap. When the stored hit is released, the struck target is also revealed briefly with Glowing.
$(l)Use case$()$(br)The Chain is strongest in fights where you know you will be hit before you get your answer. It is not a passive stat increase; it is delayed retaliation.
